title: RISK: SET_NICKNAME store error logged but response not guaranteed sent
description: relay/src/ws.rs lines 418: store.try_set_nickname() error is logged with error!(). However, no error response is sent to the client. The client waits for either success or error and will time out after a few seconds. If nickname updates start failing (DB full, permissions issue), clients will hang briefly on each attempt, then time out and reconnect. A solo maintainer sees error logs but users see silent hangs. Risk: silent client hangs when store fails; poor UX and hard to correlate with error logs.
close_reason: Duplicate of nie-hhmj.11 (same bug: try_set_nickname Err branch logs but sends no response). Tracked and will be fixed under nie-hhmj.11.
